canaries.title: Canary Guards
items: Per-slot metadata tracks name, offset, section, and writable phase
Guard pattern plants 16-float tails near declared tensor bounds
Tail canaries catch overruns near allocator boundaries
Use slot maps to connect the first corrupt guard to the owning op

lines: 2) run forward, verify guards and weights
